@viktoroddy
HOW TO CREATE TRENDING BEAUTIFUL LANDING PAGES WITH NANO BANANA PRO 2 + ANTIGRAVITY
1) Start with a killer design system - AI does the rest
Dump your full token setup right into the prompt first:
--bg-space: #000000 --text-glow:
#FAFAFA
--accent-purple:
#7B39FC

2) Source premium assets via AI

Skip boring stock. Use Nano Banana Pro 2 to gen custom cosmic elements—prompt:
"Purple nebula space scene with glowing planets, floating asteroids, starry background, high-res PNG for hero."
For animations, leverage VEO 3:
"Animate this space scene with subtle orbits and glow pulses, 6s loop, MP4 export."
Embed as background video.

3) Nail the layout & animations early

Specify: Inter & Instrument Serif fonts, clamp(60px, 7vw, 76px) for headlines with -2px letter-spacing, mouse-based hovers, backdrop-blur for depth. Ditch defaults — no flat icons, gen custom SVGs with purple neon filters via Nano Banana.

4) Structure sections like a storyboard

  • Hero → Full-vh with VEO-animated video background (120% scale, bottom-anchored, blurred overlay pill at top: 801x384px, #000000, 77.5px blur)
  • Navbar → Max 1440px, padded, flex row with logo, links (Manrope 14px), buttons ("Sign In" white-bordered, "Get Started" purple-shadowed)
  • Content → Centered column: Dual-line heading (Automate repetitive. Focus on growth.), subtitle (Manrope 18px, 90% opacity), CTAs (purple/dark-purple buttons)
  • Dashboard → Glassmorphic container (1163px, rgba(255,255,255,0.05), 10px blur), inner padded mockup image.
One detailed Antigravity prompt builds it all.

5) Add anti-generic rules to every gen

"No flat designs. Pure black dark mode. Awwwards-level cosmic interactions. Use specular glows + ambient occlusion for realism."
This turns AI output from meh to premium.

6) Refine with visuals

Gen → Screenshot weak spots → Reprompt:
"Keep system, enhance nebula depth to match ref, add smoother video loops via VEO 3."

7) Polish with pro touches

Integrate real-time agents in Antigravity for dynamic elements. Add subtle hovers: scale 1.05, shadow lift, purple shifts. These make it feel hand-crafted, not AI-spit.
AI isn't the bottleneck — vague prompts are. Brief it like a top studio, and you'll ship interstellar masterpieces in seconds.
(That purple nebula hero with orbiting asteroids? Built this way in under 2 mins.)
Try it, tweak it, dominate. What'll you create?
